name: AIGOV Daily Log Index Usage
message:
Attention: @mcaas-support@gsa.gov

Please review the use of log indexing. If this alert has been sent, the current period of [1d] use of log indexing has reached the threshold of [5000000] we have set.

This may indicate un-natural growth and may need to be addressed. Please identify major offenders and work with the application owner to reduce the amount of logs being generated - or exclude the offending log patterns in Datadog indexing.

This may indicate natural growth and the settings on this alert can be increased. If increasing the threshold of this alert, please review against the FCS contract and ensure we are not going to exceed our contracted usage amounts.
